findings.evidence: `rg -n "SubMulAction.OfFixingSubgroup|fixingSubgroup_le_stabilizer" code/TauCeti/Geometry/Diffeomorphism/FixingSubgroup.lean` shows the public import at line 10 and the only use is the wrapper theorem at lines 114-116.
findings.fix: Make this a non-public import, or prove `fixingSubgroup_le_stabilizer` locally from `mem_fixingSubgroup_iff` and `MulAction.mem_stabilizer_iff` so only the statement-level dependencies are public.
findings.issue: `public import Mathlib.GroupTheory.GroupAction.SubMulAction.OfFixingSubgroup` makes every importer of the diffeomorphism-relative fixer module also import/export the full `SubMulAction.ofFixingSubgroup` API, which is not part of the relative diffeomorphism surface.

summary: The relative diffeomorphism fixer API is mostly scoped to the target, but the module re-exports a large unrelated Mathlib development just to use one proof lemma internally.
